company_type: Technology - Multicloud Application Security and Delivery

regions: Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)

supply_chain.dependencies: Single contract manufacturer (Flex Ltd.) for all hardware assembly; several hardware components purchased from single or limited sources with variable lead times
supply_chain.risks: Reliance on single contract manufacturer; single or limited source suppliers for key hardware components; potential supply chain disruptions; component shortages; lead time variability; inventory obsolescence risk if components unused or products unsold within specified periods

regulatory_risks: U.S. export controls and encryption technology regulations requiring export licenses
Foreign import regulations on encryption technology limiting product distribution
Changes in export/import regulations or enforcement could restrict customer deployments
Data protection and privacy laws (GDPR, evolving U.S. state laws) with increasing enforcement and sanctions
Changing definitions of personal data (IP addresses, machine identification, location data) may limit operations
Government certification requirements for federal sales may change, restricting market access
U.S. government procurement requirements (e.g., U.S. manufacturing mandates)
OECD Pillar Two minimum tax framework enacted in multiple countries
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive compliance costs
Proposed AI regulations (e.g., EU AI legislation) creating legal/regulatory uncertainty
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Climate-related and sustainability-focused laws and regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions compliance requirements may delay shipments and reduce quarterly revenue
Product misuse for censorship could damage reputation
Diversion of products to restricted third parties could result in investigations, penalties, fines, and trade restrictions
Geopolitical unrest and armed conflicts (e.g., Israel and surrounding region) may disrupt operations
Israeli employee reserve duty obligations could disrupt operations if called for active duty
